waves.rationale: Tracer bullet must land first — all subsequent tasks depend on the data store, timezone engine, and project scaffold.

Transit Cards and Section Theming both depend on Wave 1 but not on each other. No shared files — Transit Card touches TransitCard component + getNextTransit; Theming touches SectionThemeProvider + getAccommodation.
Timeline View depends on Section Theming (Wave 2) for themed section headers.
Day Detail View depends on Timeline View (Wave 3) for navigation source.
PWA wraps the complete app — depends on all views being built.

tracks.name: TripCompanion App
tracks.goal: Build a glance-first PWA for multi-country trip itinerary management

tasks.name: Tracer Bullet: Trip Data Store + Date/Timezone Engine + Today View
tasks.scope: Next.js scaffold, trip-data.ts with typed data + query functions, Date/Timezone Engine, Today View page with section/day/activities
acceptance_criteria: Next.js project scaffolded with TypeScript, App Router, static export
trip-data.ts defines typed Trip/Section/Day/Activity data and exports query functions
Placeholder data covers all 4 sections with at least 2 days each
Date/Timezone Engine correctly computes cumulative day number from trip start
isToday() works across timezone boundaries
Today View renders section name, Day N, formatted date, and activity list
Before-trip and after-trip states render appropriate messages
Deploys to Vercel and renders correctly on iPhone viewport
tasks.completion_notes: 31 tests passing (16 timezone, 12 trip-data, 3 today-view). 12/14 evals PASS; FE-001-EC-02 (after-trip) and FE-003-EC-01 (cross-tz transit display) deferred to later tasks.
tasks.agent_instructions: Scaffold Next.js with App Router; use output:'export' in next.config; use Intl.DateTimeFormat for timezone formatting — no date-fns/luxon; co-locate query functions in trip-data.ts with the data; Plus Jakarta Sans for headings, Inter for body via Google Fonts; cream base #FFFBF5

tasks.name: Transit Cards + Next Transit on Today View
tasks.scope: Transit Card component, getNextTransit() query function, Next Transit Banner on Today View
acceptance_criteria: Transit Card renders all fields: type icon, carrier, reference, origin/destination with local times, app note
getNextTransit(from) returns the first transit event after the given datetime, crossing section boundaries
Departure time shown in departure city timezone, arrival in arrival city timezone
App note renders in italic muted text when present, hidden when absent
Today View shows Next Transit Banner prominently; hidden when no future transit exists
Multiple transit types work: flight, train, ferry
tasks.completion_notes: 13 new tests (7 getNextTransit, 6 TransitCard). All 12 evals PASS. getNextTransit scans all sections chronologically. TransitCard is purely presentational with formatLocalTime integration. Today View shows Next Transit banner when future transit exists.
tasks.agent_instructions: Add getNextTransit(from: Date) to trip-data.ts; TransitCard is presentational — receives all data as props; use formatLocalTime from timezone.ts for time display; transit type icons: plane for flight, train for train, ship for ferry

tasks.name: Section Theming + Accommodation Card
tasks.scope: SectionThemeProvider, Accommodation Card, getAccommodation() query, theme integration into Today View
acceptance_criteria: SectionThemeProvider maps all 4 section IDs to correct accent colors
Unknown section ID falls back to neutral gray
CSS custom properties available to all child components
Accommodation Card renders hotel icon, name, and address
getAccommodation(date) returns the hotel for the given date's section
Today View section header banner uses section accent as background color
Transit Card left border uses section accent color
tasks.completion_notes: 9 new tests (7 SectionThemeProvider, 2 AccommodationCard). All 5 evals PASS. SectionThemeProvider sets CSS custom properties --section-accent and --section-accent-10. AccommodationCard is presentational. Today View wrapped in SectionThemeProvider with themed header banner and AccommodationCard. globals.css and trip-data.ts unchanged (getAccommodation already existed from task 1.1).
tasks.agent_instructions: SectionThemeProvider sets --section-accent and --section-accent-10 as CSS custom properties on a wrapper div; color map: switzerland=#DC2626, tomorrowland=#7C3AED, rhodes=#2563EB, turkey=#0D9488; getAccommodation resolves via section lookup from date

tasks.name: Timeline View + Bottom Navigation
tasks.scope: Timeline page at /timeline, section-grouped day rows, auto-scroll to today, bottom nav bar
acceptance_criteria: Timeline View renders all 4 sections in chronological order with themed headers
Each section header shows destination name and date range
Day rows show cumulative day number, weekday, date, and summary label
Current day has accent-colored left border
Page auto-scrolls to current day on mount
Bottom navigation bar with two tabs (Today / Timeline), active tab highlighted
Before/after trip: all days shown, none highlighted
Day rows are tappable (link to /day/[date])
tasks.agent_instructions: Use getAllSections() for data; group days under section headers; auto-scroll via useEffect + scrollIntoView on the current-day element; bottom nav uses <nav> with aria-current='page' on active tab; day rows are Next.js Links to /day/[date]

tasks.name: Day Detail View
tasks.scope: Day Detail page at /day/[date], back nav, transit cards + activities + accommodation for a single day
acceptance_criteria: Route /day/[date] renders Day Detail View for the given date
Back navigation returns to Timeline View
Day header shows day badge, full date, and section name
All transit cards for the day render in chronological order
Activities card shows full activity list
Accommodation card shows hotel for that day's section
Days with no transit show activities and accommodation only
Invalid date parameter redirects to Timeline View
tasks.agent_instructions: Use getDayData(date) + getAccommodation(date) + getSection(date) for data; generate static params from getAllSections() for static export; redirect to /timeline for invalid dates; reuse TransitCard and AccommodationCard components

tasks.name: PWA + Offline Support
tasks.scope: Service worker, web manifest, cache-first offline strategy, iOS meta tags, manual refresh
acceptance_criteria: Service worker registers and activates on first load
All static assets (HTML, JS, CSS, fonts) cached after first load
App loads fully offline after initial cache
Web manifest valid: name, short_name, start_url, display: standalone, icons (192px, 512px)
iOS meta tags: apple-mobile-web-app-capable, status-bar-style
Manual refresh option clears cache and re-fetches from network
App installable to iPhone home screen via Safari Add to Home Screen
tasks.agent_instructions: Use Serwist (maintained next-pwa fork) for service worker; cache-first strategy; generate icons at 192px and 512px; add apple-mobile-web-app-capable and apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style meta tags; manual refresh via navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistration().update()
